creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
On the distcache.FreeBSD.org sites there is no ports-distfiles directory. They offer only packages resulting in fetch errors.

Examples from Poudriere log files:

=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/tzdata2018e.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/tzdata2018e.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

-------------------

=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/ehaupt/xterm-333.tgz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/xterm-333.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/xterm-333.tgz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
